purpose: Validate that petgraph + serde + thiserror compile to wasm32-unknown-unknown (required by ADR-047 single-source rule before adopting the cognicode-graph-algos crate structure)

validation_steps.notes: Initial run failed with missing trait imports (EdgeRef, NodeIndexable); fix was `use petgraph::visit::{EdgeRef, NodeIndexable};`. After fix, clean compile.
Release profile compiles identically — no platform-specific code in dep tree.
Native test verified PageRank body produces rank sum ~1.0 (mass conservation) on a 3-node cycle A->B->C->A.

key_findings: petgraph 0.6.5 compiles to wasm32-unknown-unknown without modifications or feature flags
All transitive deps (fixedbitset, indexmap, hashbrown, serde_derive, thiserror, serde_json) are pure-Rust and WASM-compatible
PageRank algorithm body in graph_analytics.rs:78-177 operates on Vec<Vec<usize>> + Vec<f64> after a one-time petgraph setup — the body has NO petgraph API calls
god_nodes algorithm (graph_analytics.rs:248-272) consumes HashMap<usize, f64> directly — zero petgraph coupling in the body
Trait imports required: `use petgraph::visit::{EdgeRef, NodeIndexable};` for `target()` and `node_bound()` methods on StableGraph
design_implications: Two-crate split (cognicode-graph-algos + cognicode-graph-wasm) is structurally required — confirmed by spike (cognicode-core cannot compile to wasm32 due to tokio/mio/socket2)
GraphBuilder trait with ONE method (build_adjacency) is sufficient — replaces the original 4-method GraphLike design
petgraph-adapter feature gate (default = []) is the correct pattern — petgraph never enters the WASM dep tree
Pure functions (page_rank, god_nodes) can be unit-tested with hand-built Vec<Vec<usize>> slices — no graph-trait mocks needed
negative_findings: cognicode-core cannot compile to wasm32 due to tokio (net feature) -> mio -> socket2 + getrandom (all `compile_error!` on wasm32). This is the architectural reason for the two-crate split.

The existing cognicode-core::application::services::graph_analytics uses petgraph::stable_graph::StableGraph and CallGraphProjection::from_call_graph — the algorithms must be extracted to a new crate to be portable.
spike_conclusion: PROCEED with the cognicode-graph-algos + cognicode-graph-wasm architecture as specified in ADR-048. The spike provides empirical evidence that the dep set [petgraph, serde, serde_json, thiserror] compiles cleanly to wasm32-unknown-unknown.
next_steps: PR #2a — create cognicode-graph-algos crate skeleton with GraphBuilder trait + pure function signatures
PR #2b — extract page_rank and god_nodes from cognicode-core into cognicode-graph-algos
PR #3 — create cognicode-graph-wasm bindgen shim + CI matrix
PR #4 — frontend integration with feature gating + graceful fallback
